race.description: Racing@ Pinjarra Park Wednesday June 24 Hcp (C5)
race.comment: LINCHPIN (6) got the job done in a photo finish two back before flying late in Open 3YO company, beaten 0.6L. Back to a Class 5 today and he showed last start the soft track is no issue. CJP rides now and if he runs up to his latest effort, he'll be very hard to beat. OUR MATE ARCHIE (2) ended last campaign with a good win at this track, scoring by 0.3L. He'll be fitter for a recent trial and Pike reunites with him having won 2/4 when aboard. Will be back in the run but can storm over the top of them late. STATE OF FURY (12) missed in a photo at York first-up and rates highly on the back of that effort. She drops a stack of weight today and with this setting up similarly, she can feature in the finish again. MISS ESPRIT (7) can improve getting out in trip today and dropping right back in trip. FLYING SOUTH (5) won't be far away.
